entries.name: Quarterly Access Review
entries.description: Upload evidence of quarterly user access review including reviewer sign-off

entries.name: Security Awareness Training
entries.description: Upload evidence of annual security awareness training completion for all employees

entries.name: Incident Response Plan Test
entries.description: Complete checklist confirming annual incident response plan testing

items.text: Incident response plan was tested via tabletop exercise or simulation
All incident response roles and responsibilities were verified
Communication channels and escalation paths were tested
Lessons learned were documented and plan updated accordingly

entries.name: Risk Acceptance Sign-off
entries.description: Declare that quarterly risk assessment has been reviewed and accepted by management
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that the quarterly risk assessment has been reviewed, all identified risks have been evaluated, and appropriate risk treatment decisions have been made and approved by management.

entries.name: Background Check Summary
entries.description: Declare that background checks were completed for all new hires in this period, or that no new hires joined
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that background checks have been completed for all new hires during this period, or that no new hires joined the organization during this period.

entries.name: Performance Review (Security Adherence)
entries.description: Upload summary of annual performance reviews covering security policy adherence

entries.name: Board Security Review Minutes
entries.description: Upload minutes of quarterly board review of information security posture

entries.name: Annual Risk Assessment Report
entries.description: Upload the annual enterprise risk assessment report

entries.name: Significant Change Impact Analysis
entries.description: Declare that significant changes affecting internal controls were analyzed this period, or that none occurred
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that any significant changes affecting the system of internal controls during this period have been analyzed and documented, or that no such significant changes occurred.

entries.name: Vendor SOC 2 Report Review
entries.description: Complete checklist confirming annual review of critical vendor SOC 2 reports

items.text: SOC 2 (or equivalent) reports for all critical vendors have been reviewed
Any exceptions or qualifications noted in vendor reports were documented
Complementary User Entity Controls (CUECs) have been identified and addressed
Remediation items for vendor issues are being tracked

entries.name: Cyber Liability Insurance Certificate
entries.description: Upload current cyber liability insurance certificate

entries.name: Privileged Access Justification Log
entries.description: Upload quarterly log of privileged access grants with business justifications

entries.name: Physical Office Visitor Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly physical office visitor log snapshot

entries.name: Office Security Walkthrough
entries.description: Complete quarterly office security walkthrough checklist

items.text: IT/server closet was locked and access-restricted
Clean-desk policy was observed across the office
CCTV cameras were functioning and recording
No physical security violations were observed

entries.name: Incident Post-Mortem Summary
entries.description: Declare that all security incidents this period have post-mortem documentation, or that none occurred
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that all security incidents that occurred during this period have documented post-mortem summaries, or that no security incidents occurred during this period.

entries.name: Disaster Recovery Test Report
entries.description: Upload the annual disaster recovery test report

entries.name: Backup Restoration Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly backup restoration test log

entries.name: Quarterly Capacity Review
entries.description: Upload the quarterly capacity review report

entries.name: Data Classification Registry
entries.description: Upload the annual data classification registry listing data assets and their confidentiality levels

entries.name: Media Sanitization Certificate
entries.description: Declare that all decommissioned media was sanitized or destroyed this period, with certificates attached for any such events
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that no media decommissioning events occurred this period, or that all such events that did occur have sanitization/destruction certificates attached.

entries.name: Employee NDA Acknowledgment
entries.description: Declare that all employees have acknowledged the current NDA and code-of-conduct during this period
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that all current employees have signed or re-acknowledged the organization's NDA and code-of-conduct during this period.

entries.name: User Onboarding Access Grants Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly log of user onboarding access grants, including approver and role assignments

entries.name: User Termination Access Revocation Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly log of user terminations showing timely revocation of access across systems

entries.name: Annual Policy Review Log
entries.description: Upload the annual log documenting review (and any updates) of all information security policies

entries.name: Fraud Risk Assessment
entries.description: Upload the annual fraud risk assessment identifying potential fraud scenarios and mitigating controls

entries.name: Security Communication Channel Evidence
entries.description: Declare that a security communication channel is active and has been used this period to communicate security updates
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that a dedicated security communication channel (Slack channel, mailing list, or intranet page) exists and has been used this period to communicate security updates and alerts to employees.

entries.name: Vendor Risk Directory Snapshot
entries.description: Upload the quarterly vendor risk directory snapshot listing all active vendors with data classification and risk tier

entries.name: Office Badge Access Review
entries.description: Upload the quarterly office badge access review listing active badge holders and access levels

entries.name: Secure Hardware Storage Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly log of hardware assets stored in secure locations including check-in/check-out records

entries.name: Hardware Asset Inventory
entries.description: Upload the quarterly hardware asset inventory listing all company-owned devices with assigned owners and locations

entries.name: Change Approval Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly change approval log showing all production changes with approver sign-off

entries.name: Emergency Change Procedure Declaration
entries.description: Declare that emergency change procedures are documented and were followed for any emergency changes this period
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that documented emergency change procedures exist and were followed for all emergency changes this period, or that no emergency changes occurred.

entries.name: Vulnerability Remediation Tracker
entries.description: Upload the quarterly vulnerability remediation tracker showing open/closed vulnerabilities and remediation timelines

entries.name: Hardening Standards Document
entries.description: Upload the current hardening standards document covering OS, database, and application baseline configurations

entries.name: Vulnerability Scan Results
entries.description: Upload the quarterly vulnerability scan results from internal or external scanning tools

entries.name: File Integrity Monitoring Configuration
entries.description: Upload the current file integrity monitoring (FIM) configuration showing monitored paths and alerting rules

entries.name: Privacy Notice Publication Proof
entries.description: Upload proof that the privacy notice is published and accessible (screenshot, URL, or archived copy)

entries.name: DSAR Fulfillment Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly DSAR fulfillment log showing all data subject requests received and their resolution status

entries.name: Marketing Opt-In Consent Proof
entries.description: Upload proof that marketing communications only go to users who have given explicit opt-in consent

entries.name: Quarterly Privacy Program Review
entries.description: Complete the quarterly privacy program review checklist

items.text: Privacy notice reviewed and confirmed current
DSAR log reviewed and all requests resolved or in progress

entries.name: Data Minimization Proof
entries.description: Declare that personal data collection is limited to what is necessary as described in the privacy notice
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that the organization collects only the personal information necessary for the purposes identified in the privacy notice, and that a review of data collection practices has been completed for this period.

entries.name: Business Continuity Plan
entries.description: Upload the current business continuity plan documenting recovery procedures and business impact analysis

entries.name: Data Retention & Disposal Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly data retention and disposal log showing data disposed per the retention schedule

entries.name: Cryptographic Key Management Log
entries.description: Upload the quarterly cryptographic key management log covering key generation, rotation, and retirement

entries.name: System Architecture Diagram
entries.description: Upload the current system architecture diagram showing major components, data flows, and trust boundaries

entries.name: Customer Data Segregation Attestation
entries.description: Declare that customer data is logically or physically segregated and that controls prevent cross-tenant access
entries.declaration_text: I confirm that customer data is logically or physically segregated, and that access controls are in place to prevent unauthorized cross-tenant data access.
